task_completion.description: Locate the candidate record for Elias Thorne.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A candidate list or profile page showing the name 'Elias Thorne' and the vacancy 'Sales Representative'.
A button click for 'Hire', a status change confirmation, or the candidate's status explicitly displaying 'Hired'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the newly created employee profile for Elias Thorne.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Employee Information or Personal Details page for Elias Thorne is visible.

task_completion.description: Access the contact details or email settings section of the employee profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Contact Details' tab or the specific section where employee email addresses are managed is open.

task_completion.description: Enter the target work email address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text input field for 'Work Email' contains exactly 'elias.thorne@gymhrcorp.com'.

task_completion.description: Save the updated employee profile with the new work email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Successfully Saved') or the profile page displaying 'elias.thorne@gymhrcorp.com' as the saved work email.

integrity.description: The agent used the web application GUI to perform the actions, not terminal commands or database scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the HR management system, without terminal windows or database command-line interfaces.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual HR application rather than a text editor or static mocked page.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of intermediate navigation steps, functional menus, and standard web UI elements of the HR system.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected outcomes into a text file to fake completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The email address and status changes are visible within the actual HR system's input fields and data tables, not in a notepad or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Candidate Name: Elias Thorne. Vacancy: Sales Representative. Target Work Email: elias.thorne@gymhrcorp.com. The VLM must verify that the candidate's status is changed to 'Hired' and that the employee profile's work email is updated to the target email.
